package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for api_error_type_outside_transport_package: API-facing error payload structs living in persistence or business packages instead of transport-boundary packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule001NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule001NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule001NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario001Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule001NegativeService, input Rule001NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
